cards.back: A supervised learning algorithm where the new instance is classified by finding the most similar instance in the training data
A variation of the K-Nearest-Neighbor algorithm where the votes of the k nearest neighbors are weighted based on their distance
A supervised learning algorithm where the new instance is classified by finding the class that is closest to the centroid of the training data
A technique used in the Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor algorithm to give more weight to the neighbors that are closer to the new instance
A supervised learning algorithm where the new instance is classified by finding the k most similar instances in the training data
